title: No Inventory
description: Removes the Inventory from the game
body:
🔒 Restricted Inventory

A simple Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that completely locks the player’s inventory, allowing only the hotbar and armor slots to be used.

✨ Features
		
🚫 Blocks the inventory screen (E)

🧱 Only hotbar + armor slots are accessible

❌ Main inventory is completely disabled and visually blocked

⛔ Prevents shift-clicking, number-key moving, and mouse dragging into blocked slots

🎯 Any attempt to bypass (drag into blocked slots) drops the item on the ground — no item loss
	
⚙️ Technical Info

Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

Mod Loader: Forge (47.4.6+)

Java: 17+ License: All rights reserved

Author: Zurned
